title: CORE Data Contract (ADR-056 D1)
description: Meta-schema for runtime data contracts declared in .intent/enforcement/contracts/. A data contract governs the field structure of one or more Python classes (its governed_classes); the AST gate's schema_conformance check loads the contract, finds matching ClassDef nodes in the targeted source files, and validates that each class declares fields conforming to the contract's properties and required lists. Data contracts are first-class constitutional artifacts: introducing or modifying one requires an ADR. Their authority is the declaration; the Python class is the governed artefact.

governed_classes.description: Python class names that this contract governs. The AST gate's schema_conformance check looks up these names in the targeted source file's ClassDef nodes. Classes that exist in the file are validated; classes absent from the file are skipped silently (the rule glob determines which files are checked).

properties.description: Declared fields the governed classes may carry. Keys are field names; values are JSON Schema definitions (only field presence is validated by the current AST gate check — type/format constraints are recorded for future enforcement). A field present in a governed class but absent from this object is reported as undeclared.

required.description: Field names that every governed class must declare. A required field absent from a governed class is reported as missing.
